response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive software development experience and a strong background in full-stack web technologies, he critically lacks the mandatory 8 years of C++ programming experience required for this role. His background leans heavily towards Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang in product-focused environments, rather than the deep, large-scale internal cloud infrastructure and compute technology leadership specifically requested in the job description.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience with a demonstrated ability to architect and launch products.
Strong advocacy for engineering best practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and community mentoring via workshops.
Proven ability to work with distributed systems and microservices, such as handling high-throughput requests at Dunnhumby.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ experience, with only about 7 months documented.
Career history is heavily skewed towards full-stack and web development rather than core cloud compute platform infrastructure.
Lacks explicit technical leadership experience managing or mentoring teams specifically composed of cloud or DevOps engineers.
